discrepancy_analysis: The reported result states 'p < 0.01, MPNST-G1 has more fusions' and the model result shows F=5.35 with p=0.00135, and identifies MPNST_G1 as having the highest mean fusions (23.8). The model's p-value (0.00135) satisfies the reported threshold p < 0.01, and both analyses agree that MPNST-G1 has the most fusion events. These results are fully consistent, both qualitatively and quantitatively.
